name: Permanence Break
short_description: A sci-fi first-person puzzle game based around object permanence. Move and look around rooms in order to pick which objects you see and which you don't.
detailed_description:
Do objects act the same when you're looking at them as when you're not? In this game not all of them do. Play as a test subject solving puzzles using object-permanence breaking game mechanics in order to get your cash prize.

Key Features
  • Solve puzzles by moving cubes, pressing buttons, and unlocking doors. But be sure to pay attention to where you're looking!
  • Many Objects will refuse to move or press buttons based on if they're seen.
  • Unlock new batches of levels you can play through in whichever order you choose.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, French, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
